caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey peaked hairstyle sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with several framed photographs and clothing items, including a shirt with "LEE" printed on it. A logo on the left side of the screen features a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST" below the word "STUDIO". On the right side, red text reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, facing slightly to his left with a serious expression, although there are subtle shifts in his posture and facial muscles as he speaks. The camera angle and the arrangement of the equipment remain constant across the frames.
